goal: 语音输入（STT）和语音输出（TTS）功能：使用 Web Speech API 实现麦克风语音识别输入和 AI 回复语音朗读。在 VideoChat 页面集成麦克风按钮、语音朗读开关。

coverage_checklist.useSpeechRecognition_exists: assert: src/renderer/hooks/useSpeechRecognition.ts 创建，支持语音识别返回文本
coverage_checklist.useTTS_exists: assert: src/renderer/hooks/useTTS.ts 创建，支持文本转语音朗读
coverage_checklist.microphone_button_in_ui: assert: VideoChat.tsx 有麦克风按钮用于语音输入
coverage_checklist.tts_toggle_in_ui: assert: VideoChat.tsx 有语音朗读开关
coverage_checklist.voice_input_flow: assert: 语音识别文本填入输入框或直接发送
coverage_checklist.tts_auto_read: assert: AI 回复后可选自动朗读
coverage_checklist.types_passes: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.tests_passes: assert: bun run test 通过
coverage_checklist.build_passes: assert: bun run build 通过
